The city council took up number
of important matters at it's meeting
last night. Councilman Foster
brought up the subject of additional
water supply and introduced a reso-
luton calling on the city engineer to
prepare preliminary plans and esti-
mate for a 5000, gallon reservoir
on the hill south of the city. for
which. he stated, the Spokane Wash
ington Improvement company will do
nate the land.
